chapter_title.en: Chapter 96 – The safety of the Religion

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مرسل - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (9/163)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مرسل - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (9/163)
text: كَانَ رَجُلٌ يَدْخُلُ عَلَى أَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) مِنْ أَصْحَابِهِ فَغَبَرَ زَمَاناً لَا يَحُجُّ فَدَخَلَ عَلَيْهِ بَعْضُ مَعَارِفِهِ فَقَالَ لَهُ فُلَانٌ مَا فَعَلَ قَالَ فَجَعَلَ يُضَجِّعُ الْكَلَامَ يَظُنُّ أَنَّهُ إِنَّمَا يَعْنِي الْمَيْسَرَةَ وَ الدُّنْيَا فَقَالَ أَبُو عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) كَيْفَ دِينُهُ فَقَالَ كَمَا تُحِبُّ فَقَالَ هُوَ وَ اللَّهِ الْغِنَى .

en.hubeali: A number of our companions, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad Bin Khalid, from Ibn Fazzal, from Yunus Bin Yaqoub, from one of his companions who said,

‘A man from his<sup>asws</sup> used to come over to Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup>, but he was absent for a time not performing Hajj. So one of his acquaintances came over to him<sup>asws</sup>. So he<sup>asws</sup> said to him: ‘So and so, what happened?’ So he went on laying down the speech, thinking that he, rather, had become rich, the affluent, and the worldly. So Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘How is his Religion?’ So he said, ‘Just as you<sup>asws</sup> love’. So he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘By Allah<sup>azwj</sup>! It is the richness’.
en.sarwar: 4. A number of our people have narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad ibn Khalid from ibn Faddal from Yunus ibn Ya’qub from certain individuals of his people who has said the following: “A man, of the companions of abu ‘Abd Allah (a.s.) would very often attend the gathering with the Imam. He remained absent for a certain time and did not attend Hajj also. Once a certain individual of his people who knew him came in and the Imam asked, ‘How so and so is doing?’ The narrator has said that the man then began to speak of him in very short expressions thinking that he meant thereby wealth and the world. Abu ‘Abd Allah (a.s.) then asked, ‘How is his religion?’ He said, ‘It is just as you love.’ The Imam said, ‘That, by Allah, is wealth.’”
